name: Benzophenone
plain_summary: Aromatic ketone famous for n→π* photochemistry and triplet sensitization teaching.

abs.plain_caption: Strong π→π* near 252 nm; weak n→π* near ~330 nm (teaching contrast of band strengths).
abs.lit: Teaching envelope: benzophenone π→π* ~250 nm and weak n→π* ~330 nm in ethanol (classic textbook values).
